claim: Agentic RAG uses a reasoning loop where the agent can decide which tools to use to explore the knowledge base in different ways, rather than a single one-shot vector search.
actionable: Design RAG systems where the agent has multiple tools available (vector search, document listing, SQL queries) and can choose which to apply based on the query.
source_title: The ULTIMATE n8n RAG AI Agent Template - Local AI Edition

claim: Ollama models default to 2,000 token context length which is insufficient for agentic RAG workflows; you must create a custom model file to increase context to 8,000+ tokens.
actionable: When using Ollama for agents, create a Modelfile inheriting from base models and set the context parameter to 8000 or higher before deployment.
source_title: The ULTIMATE n8n RAG AI Agent Template - Local AI Edition

claim: For tabular data in RAG systems, store all rows in a single JSONB column rather than creating separate tables per file to maintain flexible schema handling.
actionable: In PostgreSQL-based RAG pipelines, use a document_rows table with a JSONB row_data column to store heterogeneous CSV/Excel data, queried via agent-written SQL.
source_title: The ULTIMATE n8n RAG AI Agent Template - Local AI Edition

claim: Always delete old document records before re-ingesting updated files to prevent hallucination from stale data coexisting with new data in the knowledge base.
actionable: Implement a delete-before-insert pattern when updating RAG documents: remove all old embeddings and rows for a file before re-indexing.
source_title: The ULTIMATE n8n RAG AI Agent Template - Local AI Edition

claim: Using the open AI node with a custom base URL pointing to Ollama is a workaround for a glitch in n8n where the native Chat Ollama model fails when invoking RAG tools with object type errors.
actionable: For n8n RAG workflows with local Ollama, configure the OpenAI model node with base_url pointing to your Ollama instance instead of using the Chat Ollama node.
source_title: The ULTIMATE n8n RAG AI Agent Template - Local AI Edition

claim: Store document metadata including file ID and title as JSONB in embeddings so the agent can cite sources when answering from retrieved chunks.
actionable: Include metadata objects with document ID and title in vector store operations to enable the agent to reference source documents in responses.
source_title: The ULTIMATE n8n RAG AI Agent Template - Local AI Edition
